title: Runtime contract settings
goal: Implement safe runtime contract editing for memory, AI and core contract-backed settings.
acceptance: Runtime contract descriptors can read current values from data/contracts/.
Candidate changes are validated with existing full-payload validators before write.
Cross-contract validation is available for memory sources/profiles/routing/ingestion profiles.
Apply writes JSON atomically using temp file and os.replace semantics.
UI shows masked diff and requires confirmation before write.
Audit records actor, setting_id, before/after hashes and validation result.
Settings backed by default contracts in contracts/ are read-only in production GUI.
verification: python manage.py test apps.settings_center.tests apps.memory.tests apps.ai.tests
